mapper.sql: smqa.id, smqa.assessment_month, smqa.work_card, smqa.name, smqa.assessment_level, smqa.submission_identification_flag, smqa.submitter, smqa.submit_time, smqa.assessment_type, smqa.create_time, smqa.create_by, smqa.update_time, smqa.update_by, smqa.se_id, smqa.enabled_flag, smqa.assessment_num, smqa.frozen_flag

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.assessment_month as ${tAlias}_assessment_month, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.assessment_level as ${tAlias}_assessment_level, ${tAlias}.submission_identification_flag as ${tAlias}_submission_identification_flag, ${tAlias}.submitter as ${tAlias}_submitter, ${tAlias}.submit_time as ${tAlias}_submit_time, ${tAlias}.assessment_type as ${tAlias}_assessment_type, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.se_id as ${tAlias}_se_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.assessment_num as ${tAlias}_assessment_num, ${tAlias}.frozen_flag as ${tAlias}_frozen_flag

select isnull((select pe.name from pm_employee pe join fnd_user fu on fu.id = smqa.update_by and fu.employee_id = pe.id ), '') as update_by_str,
,se.department as department, se.administrative_office as administrative_office from swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment smqa , swm_employee se
mapper.insert: insert into swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment (assessment_month, work_card, name, assessment_level, submission_identification_flag, submitter, submit_time, assessment_type, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, se_id, enabled_flag,assessment_num, frozen_flag) values (#{assessmentMonth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assessmentLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{submissionIdentificationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{submitter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{submitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{assessmentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{seId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag, jdbcType=BIT}, #{assessmentNum, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{frozenFlag,jdbcType=BIT})
mapper.sql: delete from swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and frozen_flag = 0
mapper.update: update swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment set assessment_month = #{assessmentMonth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assessment_level = #{assessmentLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, submission_identification_flag = #{submissionIdentificationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, submitter = #{submitter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, submit_time = #{submitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, assessment_type = #{assessmentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, se_id = #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag, jdbcType=BIT}, assessment_num = #{assessmentNum, jdbcType = DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select smqa.work_card, smqa.assessment_month as year, smqa.YS, smqa.S as typeS, smqa.A as typeA, smqa.B as typeB, smqa.C as typeC, smqa.D as typeD, t2.FZ as score from (select sqa.work_card,LEFT(sqa.assessment_month, 4) AS assessment_month,COUNT(*) AS YS,SUM(CASE sqa.assessment_level WHEN 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS S, SUM(CASE sqa.assessment_level WHEN 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS A, SUM(CASE sqa.assessment_level WHEN 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS B, SUM(CASE sqa.assessment_level WHEN 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS C, SUM(CASE sqa.assessment_level WHEN 'D' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS D from swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment sqa where sqa.enabled_flag=1 and sqa.assessment_type='month' group by sqa.work_card,LEFT(sqa.assessment_month, 4)) smqa inner join (select t1.work_card ,LEFT(t1.assessment_month, 4) as ND,sum(sar.assessment_right) as fz from swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment t1 inner join swm_appraisal_rules sar on t1.assessment_level=sar.assessment_grade group by t1.work_card,LEFT(t1.assessment_month, 4)) as t2 on smqa.assessment_month=t2.nd and smqa.work_card=t2.work_card where smqa.work_card= #{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR} order by smqa.assessment_month desc

select top 1 smqa.assessment_month from swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment smqa where (left(smqa.assessment_month, 4) + RIGHT(smqa.assessment_month, 2)) = (select max((left(smqat.assessment_month, 4) + RIGHT(smqat.assessment_month, 2))) from swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment smqat where smqat.enabled_flag = 1 and smqat.assessment_type = 'month' ) and smqa.enabled_flag = 1 and smqa.assessment_type = 'month'
select count(1) from swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment smqa where smqa.assessment_type = 'month' and smqa.enabled_flag = 1 and smqa.assessment_month = #{period, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment set assessment_level = #{assessmentLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, submission_identification_flag = 1, submitter = #{submitter, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, submit_time = #{submitTime, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and enabled_flag = 1
mapper.select: select count(1) from swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment smqa where smqa.assessment_type = 'month' and smqa.enabled_flag = 1 and smqa.assessment_month = #{period, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and smqa.frozen_flag=1

SELECT pej.dept_id,ISNULL(a.department, '') AS department, ISNULL(a.administrative_office, '') AS administrative_office, COUNT(*) AS total_num, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) < 11 THEN CONVERT(integer, LEFT(CONVERT(varchar, COUNT(*) + 9), 1)) WHEN COUNT(*) < 100 AND COUNT(*) > 10 THEN CONVERT(integer, LEFT(CONVERT(varchar, COUNT(*)), 1) + 1) WHEN COUNT(*) >= 100 THEN CONVERT(integer, LEFT(CONVERT(varchar, COUNT(*) + 10), 2)) END AS actual_num, isnull(( select count(*) from swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment smqa left join swm_employee se on se.work_card=smqa.work_card where smqa.assessment_level='A' and smqa.enabled_flag=1 and smqa.assessment_month= #{assessmentMonth,jdbcType = VARCHAR} and se.department= #{department, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and se.administrative_office= #{administrativeOffice, jdbcType = VARCHAR}),'') as currentNum FROM swm_employee a left join swm_employee b on isnull(a.department,'')=isnull(b.department,'') and isnull(a.administrative_office,'')=isnull(b.administrative_office,'') left join pm_employee_job pej on pej.employee_id=b.employee_id WHERE a.accessment_form = 'month' and b.work_card= #{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and pej.enabled_flag=1 GROUP BY pej.dept_id, ISNULL(a.department, ''), -- 分组统一空值 ISNULL(a.administrative_office, '')

SELECT 0 as no_limit_dept_flag, a.department, a.administrative_office, COUNT(*) AS total_num, CEILING(COUNT(*)/10.0) AS actual_num, isnull((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment smqa LEFT JOIN swm_employee se ON se.work_card = smqa.work_card WHERE smqa.assessment_level = 'A' AND smqa.enabled_flag = 1 AND smqa.assessment_month = #{assessmentMonth,jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND se.department = a.department AND ISNULL(se.administrative_office,'#') = ISNULL(a.administrative_office,'#')), '') AS current_num FROM swm_employee a LEFT JOIN swm_employee b ON isnull(a.department, '') = isnull(b.department, '') AND isnull(a.administrative_office, '') = isnull(b.administrative_office, '') WHERE a.accessment_form = 'month' AND b.work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND a.work_flag = 1 GROUP BY a.department, a.administrative_office

SELECT 1 as no_limit_dept_flag,tmp.department, SUM(tmp.actual_num) actual_num, isnull((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swm_monthly_quarterly_assessment smqa LEFT JOIN swm_employee se ON se.work_card = smqa.work_card WHERE smqa.assessment_level = 'A' AND smqa.enabled_flag = 1 AND smqa.assessment_month = #{assessmentMonth,jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND se.department = tmp.department), '') AS current_num FROM (SELECT a.department, a.administrative_office, COUNT(*) AS total_num, CEILING(COUNT(*)/10.0) AS actual_num FROM swm_employee a LEFT JOIN swm_employee b ON isnull(a.department, '') = isnull(b.department, '') WHERE a.accessment_form = 'month' AND b.work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND a.work_flag = 1 GROUP BY a.department, a.administrative_office ) tmp GROUP BY tmp.department
